title: ID AND DRIVERS LICENSE ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND ID AND DRIVERS LICENSE ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with the cost of renewing, replacing, or original application for ID's and Drivers Licence. This does not include reinstatement fees, the Real ID, or costs of tests though the DMV. 950 SE 3rd Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 389-6643 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 389-6643 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and speak to a receptionist FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Must have two valid forms of ID in order to redeem issued checks at the DMV LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Alfalfa, Bend, Powell Butte, Sunriver, Three Rivers, Tumalo, and zip codes 97701, 97703 SITE HOURS: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across from Chan's Chinese Restaurant Services: Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND
